name: @101-school/functional-tests
description: Functional test suite for Yggdrasil Educational Platform

scripts.test:functional: LOG_LEVEL=warn AUTH_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:3101 USER_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:3102 COURSE_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:3103 PLANNING_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:3104 NEWS_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:3105 STATISTICS_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:3106 NOTIFICATION_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:3107 jest --testPathPattern=functional --runInBand --reporters=default
scripts.test:functional:clean: LOG_LEVEL=warn AUTH_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:3101 USER_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:3102 COURSE_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:3103 PLANNING_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:3104 NEWS_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:3105 STATISTICS_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:3106 NOTIFICATION_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:3107 jest --testPathPattern=functional --runInBand --reporters=./src/utils/FunctionalTestReporter.js
scripts.test:functional:verbose: LOG_LEVEL=debug AUTH_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:3101 USER_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:3102 COURSE_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:3103 PLANNING_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:3104 NEWS_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:3105 STATISTICS_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:3106 NOTIFICATION_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:3107 jest --testPathPattern=functional --runInBand --verbose
scripts.test:functional:quiet: LOG_LEVEL=error AUTH_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:3101 USER_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:3102 COURSE_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:3103 PLANNING_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:3104 NEWS_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:3105 STATISTICS_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:3106 NOTIFICATION_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:3107 jest --testPathPattern=functional --runInBand --silent
scripts.test:all: npm run test:auth && npm run test:user && npm run test:course && npm run test:planning && npm run test:news && npm run test:statistics && npm run test:integration && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:functional
